top_signals.title: UAE says new pipeline that will bypass Strait of Hormuz is nearly 50% complete
top_signals.summary: The UAE has redirected some oil exports through an existing pipeline to Fujairah, which has a maximum capacity of 1.8 million barrels per day.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Bezos defends billionaires, hypes AI, talks taxes and praises Trump in major CNBC interview
top_signals.summary: Jeff Bezos rejected accusations that Amazon's decision to release a documentary on first lady Melania Trump was an effort to curry favor with the president.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
